title: Latest ‘Star Wars’ Film ‘Mandalorian’ Debuts at $100 Million
title_cn: 最新《星球大战》电影《曼达洛人》首映票房达 1 亿美元
summary: The Mandalorian and Grogu, the first film in the Star Wars franchise in seven years, was the highest-grossing movie in the US and Canada over the four-day holiday weekend with $100 million in ticket sales.

title: Ferrari Unveils 5-Seat Fully Electric Car, Shares Fall
title_cn: 法拉利推出 5 座全电动汽车，股价下跌
summary: Ferrari unveiled its first fully electric car called the Luce. It is a five-seat model priced at €550,000 ($640,000) that marks a sharp break from the sports-car maker’s fuel-burning heritage. Ferrari's shares fell in early Milan trading, suggesting investors were disappointed with the Luce’s look. Bloomberg's Danny Lee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MUFG Is Said to Explore Options for Bank Danamon Stake
title_cn: 据称三菱日联金融集团将探索银行 Danamon 股权的选择
summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc. is exploring options for PT Bank Danamon Indonesia, including a take-private of the lender or selling some its stake to increase the public float, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Oil Rebounds as US Launches New Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 美国对伊朗发动新一轮打击，油价反弹
summary: Oil rebounded as fresh US military strikes in Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal between Tehran and Washington to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Muthoot Finance Eyes Overseas Borrowings in FY27
title_cn: Muthoot Finance 着眼于 2027 财年的海外借贷
summary: George Alexander Muthoot, Managing Director at Muthoot Finance, discussed the recent gold import hike in India and said he will look to raise funds via external commercial borrowings to diversify its funding base this fiscal year. He speaks exclusively with Paul Allen on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aluminum Heads for Four-Year High on Fears of China Output Cuts
title_cn: 由于担心中国减产，铝价​​创四年新高
summary: Aluminum headed for the highest close in more than four years as fears of output cuts in top producer China compounded continuing disruptions in the Middle East.

title: European Stocks Steady as Traders Watch Iran War; Ferrari Drops
title_cn: 交易员关注伊朗战争，欧洲股市稳定；法拉利掉落
summary: European stocks were muted after six days of gains as traders monitored the latest tensions in the Middle East for signs the US and Iran are nearing a deal.

title: Malaysia Jolts Bullion Trade With 10% Import Duty on Gold Bars
title_cn: 马来西亚对金条征收 10% 的进口税，震动金条贸易
summary: Malaysia has imposed a 10% import duty on some gold bar shipments, according to traders familiar with the matter, disrupting the bullion trade in the Southeast Asian nation.

title: US Stock Futures Extend Gains as Treasuries Rally: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着国债上涨，美国股指期货扩大涨幅：市场结束
summary: US equity futures extended gains and Treasuries rallied as investors remained hopeful of an imminent deal to end the Middle East conflict, despite US strikes on Iran that sent oil prices higher.

title: China Lets Policy Loan Rate Fall to Record Low to Boost Economy
title_cn: 中国让政策性贷款利率降至历史新低以提振经济
summary: China let the interest rate on a one-year policy loan to banks decline to a record low, according to people familiar with the matter, a sign Beijing is stepping up efforts to support an economy that’s losing momentum.

From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ESAI's Emerson: More Upside Pressure for Energy Prices
title_cn: ESAI的艾默生：能源价格面临更大的上行压力
summary: ESAI Energy Founder & President Sarah Emerson believes energy prices will come under further pressure until physical oil supplies successfully navigate global choke points, like the Strait of Hormuz, and restock consumer inventories. She speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ASX Posts Worst Selloff Ever After Revising Up Tech Revamp Costs
title_cn: 上调技术改造成本后，澳大利亚证券交易所遭遇有史以来最严重的抛售
summary: ASX Ltd. shares notched their steepest drop on record after the embattled exchange operator increased its capital spending guidance as it upgrades critical market infrastructure.

title: Quad Ministers Meet as Hormuz Crisis Deepen
title_cn: 霍尔木兹危机加深，四方部长会面
summary: The US, Japan, India and Australia launched new joint initiatives for the Indo-Pacific region as the countries' foreign ministers gathered in New Delhi for a summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 伊朗协议前景不明朗，油价反弹
summary: Oil rebounded as fresh US military strikes in Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal between Tehran and Washington to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with the talks set to continue for several more days.

title: ECB Should Hike Interest Rates in June, Schnabel Says
title_cn: 施纳贝尔称欧洲央行应在六月加息
summary: The European Central Bank should raise interest rates next month even if there’s a quick resolution to the conflict in the Middle East, according to Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel.

title: Hormuz Strikes Whipsaw Oil as Asia Braces for Summer Demand | Insight with Haslinda Amin 5/26/2026
title_cn: 亚洲为夏季需求做好准备，霍尔木兹石油遭受打击哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 5/26/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBI, Rating Firms Assess Iran War Risks on Indian Companies
title_cn: 印度储备银行和评级公司评估印度公司面临的伊朗战争风险
summary: The Reserve Bank of India has held discussions with local credit-rating companies to gauge potential stress among borrowers caused by the US-Iran war, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: WHO Warns Ebola Epidemic Is ‘Outpacing’ Response
title_cn: 世卫组织警告埃博拉疫情“超出”应对速度
summary: Ebola is spreading faster in Democratic Republic of Congo than responders can contain it, the World Health Organization warned, as suspected deaths climbed above 220 and treatment centers came under attack in the country’s conflict-hit east. The crisis has drawn about $500 million in global pledges. Bloomberg's Janice Kew reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Gold Miner Is Set to Reboot a Hong Kong Listing Type Not Seen in 12 Years
title_cn: 一家黄金矿业公司将重启12年来未见的香港上市类型
summary: Indonesian gold miner PT Merdeka Gold Resources is gearing up for a Hong Kong stock-market debut with a listing structure that’s fallen out of favor for more than a decade, a sign of the city’s booming market for fundraising drumming up interest across Asia and beyond.

title: Treasury Curve Flashes Higher-for-Longer Warning Under Warsh
title_cn: 沃什警告下，国债曲线持续走高
summary: A key Treasury yield gap shrank to its tightest level in a year as traders ramped up bets the Federal Reserve may keep interest rates higher for longer under new chairman Kevin Warsh.

title: FTSE 100, Gilts Make Up Ground After Long Weekend
title_cn: 富时 100 指数和英国国债在长周末后收复失地

title: Samsung’s Non-Chip Staff Seek Court Order to Block Wage Vote
title_cn: 三星非芯片员工寻求法院命令阻止工资投票
summary: A Samsung Electronics Co. union representing workers outside the ultra-profitable semiconductor division asked a Korean court to block voting on a tentative deal that would distribute about 40 trillion won ($26.6 billion) in bonuses to chip employees.

title: Sasol’s Blistering Rally Meets Growing Skepticism From Analysts
title_cn: 沙索的强劲涨势遭到分析师日益增长的怀疑
summary: After a rally that’s seen Sasol Ltd.’s stock price double this year, analysts are becoming wary of the South African oil and chemicals company.

title: Pressure Builds for Albanese Over Housing Tax Overhaul
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼斯因住房税改革面临压力
summary: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese is facing mounting public and political pressure following last week’s federal budget, which included proposed changes to negative gearing and the capital gains tax (CGT) discount. Policy Institute of Australia CEO Amy Auster warns the tax changes could fail to address the core issue of housing supply. She spoke on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Slips as Strikes Raise Concerns on Iran Talks, Inflation
title_cn: 罢工引发对伊朗谈判和通胀的担忧，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as US strikes in the Strait of Hormuz tempered optimism over the progress of talks to unlock the critical waterway, keeping inflation risks elevated.

title: Aulis Capital's Leung on Healthcare Investments
title_cn: Aulis Capital 的 Leung 谈医疗保健投资
summary: Nisa Leung, Founding Managing Partner at Aulis Capital, discusses the investment opportunities in the healthcare sector. She speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the JPMorgan Global China Summit in Shanghai. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strikes Near Strait Muddy Outlook for Iran Deal
title_cn: 伊朗协议前景不明朗
summary: Oil rebounded as fresh US military strikes in Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal between Tehran and Washington to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with the talks set to continue for several more days. Bloomberg's Garfield Reynolds has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Climbs as US Strikes Iran Targets | The Asia Trade 5/26/2026
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗目标，油价攀升亚洲贸易 5/26/2026
summary:
"Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Pope Speaks Up for Humans, not Humanoids
title_cn: 教皇为人类而不是类人生物发声
summary: The forces driving the threat of robot overlords get a morality check.

title: AI Vs Economy Disconnect Getting Larger: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 人工智能与经济的脱节越来越大：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Joumanna Bercetche, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Bonus Boom Raises Inflation, Housing Risks for BOK, BE Says
title_cn: BE表示，筹码红利繁荣加剧了韩国央行的通胀和住房风险
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s bonus deal with workers risks turning South Korea’s AI-driven chip boom into a new source of inflation and housing-market pressure that the Bank of Korea will have to address, according to Bloomberg Economics.

title: Infratil CEO Sees ‘Latent Potential’ for Data Centers in ANZ
title_cn: Infratil 首席执行官看到 ANZ 数据中心的“潜在潜力”
summary: The artificial intelligence infrastructure boom is the biggest growth trend in recent years, with Infratil Ltd. Chief Executive Officer Jason Boyes seeing plenty of “latent potential” for new data center development in Australia and New Zealand.

title: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC
title_cn: 华为吹捧芯片突破以缩小与台积电的差距
summary: Huawei says it's come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader TSMC, potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment. Bloomberg Intelligence's Robert Lea explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Stocks in Hong Kong Rise, Shrugging Off Trading Crackdown
title_cn: 香港中概股上涨，摆脱交易打击
summary: Chinese shares listed in Hong Kong rose after returning from a holiday, as investors brushed aside Beijing’s most forceful crackdown on illicit cross-border stock trading to chase tech gains.

title: Chinese Chip Stocks Rise in Hong Kong on Hopes for Huawei Tech
title_cn: 由于对华为技术的希望，中国芯片股在香港上涨
summary: Chinese semiconductor stocks rose in Hong Kong on optimism over a potential breakthrough in technology by Huawei Technologies Co.

title: These AI Gurus Are Charging Wall Street Banks $25,000 a Day
title_cn: 这些人工智能专家每天向华尔街银行收取 25,000 美元的费用
summary: Global banks are pouring billions into artificial intelligence yet struggling to automate workflows. Two ex-bankers say they are being hired to ignite the shift.

title: Japan Cablemaker Rout Exposes Cracks in AI Infrastructure Rally
title_cn: 日本电缆制造商的溃败暴露了人工智能基础设施反弹的裂痕
summary: A $40 billion selloff in a 141-year-old Japanese cable firm has served as a reality check on the fragility of the global AI-driven stock rally.

title: The Summer We Went Back to the Movies
title_cn: 我们重回电影院的那个夏天
summary: For the first time since the pandemic shuttered cinemas the world over, Hollywood has got its mojo back.

title: Prosus Asks EU to End Forced Sale of Delivery Hero Stake
title_cn: 普罗苏斯要求欧盟终止强制出售“送货英雄”股份
summary: Prosus NV has asked the European Union to drop a requirement that it sell shares in Delivery Hero SE, part of antitrust approval for its acquisition of another delivery platform, people familiar with the matter said.

title: NTT Docomo Sells Tokyo Land Plots for $371 Million Amid Boom
title_cn: NTT Docomo 在繁荣时期以 3.71 亿美元出售东京土地
summary: NTT Docomo Inc. sold two plots of land in central Tokyo for about ¥59 billion ($371 million), according to people familiar with the matter, the latest large deal in Japan’s booming real estate market.

title: Pope Says AI Should Be Disarmed to Avoid Dominating Humanity
title_cn: 教皇称人工智能应该被解除武装以避免统治人类
summary: Pope Leo XIV said artificial intelligence should be “disarmed” to protect humanity from its dangers, adding his voice to a heated debate over the extent to which governments should regulate a technology that is reshaping the world.

title: Zepto Said to Plan June Public Filing for $1 Billion India IPO
title_cn: Zepto 计划 6 月公开申请 10 亿美元印度 IPO
summary: Rapid-commerce firm Zepto Ltd. is preparing to publicly file in the first half of June for an initial public offering that may raise up to $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SoftBank Taps Retail Market Again With $1.6 Billion Yen Bond
title_cn: 软银发行 16 亿美元日元债券再次进军零售市场
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to raise ¥260 billion ($1.6 billion) through another sale of subordinated bonds aimed mainly at individual investors, about two months after a similar retail offering.

title: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC
title_cn: 华为吹捧芯片突破以缩小与台积电的差距
summary: Huawei Technologies Co. said it has come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment.

title: Ericsson Quits Suburb Once Touted as Sweden’s Silicon Valley
title_cn: 爱立信退出曾被誉为瑞典硅谷的郊区
summary: Ericsson AB is moving its global headquarters to central Stockholm after more than two decades in Kista, a struggling suburb in the Swedish capital once touted as Sweden’s Silicon Valley.

title: SoftBank Shares Hit Record With Lift From OpenAI IPO Hopes
title_cn: OpenAI IPO 希望提振软银股价创下历史新高
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. shares climbed to a record high, spurred by hopes of big returns from the Japanese investor’s stakes in OpenAI and SB Energy Corp., should the two go public.

summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. title: China’s Cross-Border Trading Crackdown
title_cn: 中国打击跨境贸易
summary: China’s crackdown on cross-border stock trading could affect up to HK$250 billion ($32 billion) in Hong Kong-linked assets, according to Citic Securities. The move aims to tighten capital outflows and reshape investor access. William Ma, CIO of GROW Investment Group, discussed the potential impact with Paul Allen on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sakura Internet Eyes More Spending to Meet Japan’s AI Demand
title_cn: 樱花互联网计划加大投入以满足日本的人工智能需求
summary: Sakura Internet Inc.’s chief said the company may need to hike its capital spending by nearly seven times its initial plan to keep up with artificial intelligence demand in Japan.

title: AI Rally Drives Best Run in Global Momentum Stocks on Record
title_cn: 人工智能涨势推动全球动量股创下历史最佳表现
summary: The AI boom is giving momentum investors their best return in decades, as the world’s hottest stocks power ahead despite worries over potentially slower growth due to the Iran war.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/24/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 24 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Taiwan’s Special Representative to US Amb. Alexander Yui, Axios Congressional Reporter Andrew Solender, Google Data Editor Simon Rogers and Congressional Black Caucus Member Rep. Glenn Ivey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Convenes Banks to Fix Flaws Exposed by AI Models, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称，欧洲央行召集银行修复人工智能模型暴露的缺陷
summary: The European Central Bank plans to press lenders to accelerate efforts to secure their IT systems after organizing a meeting on cybersecurity risks with the latest artificial intelligence models, the Financial Times reported.

title: The Surprising Science Behind Google Searches
title_cn: 谷歌搜索背后的惊人科学
summary: Google Data Editor and Author Simon Rogers joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his new book "What We Ask Google: A Surprisingly Hopeful History of Humankind." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How New Mega-Cap IPOs Will Reshape the Markets
title_cn: 新的大型IPO将如何重塑市场
summary: SpaceX is marketing itself to IPO investors as an artificial intelligence targeting a $26.5 trillion potential market opportunity. The move signaling its intention to wrest business from investor darlings whose valuations have soared. Bloomberg Market Structure Research Head Larry Tabb joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Watch and Health Efforts Need Reboot to Rival New Wearables
title_cn: 苹果的手表和健康业务需要重新启动才能与新的可穿戴设备竞争
summary: Also: iOS 27 AirPods, Genmoji and AirPlay details.

title: Hyperscaler Debt Flood Brings Derivatives Bonanza
title_cn: 超大规模债务泛滥带来衍生品繁荣
summary: As big tech companies raise hundreds of billions of dollars to fund artificial intelligence investments, Wall Street banks are increasingly finding they have to trade more credit derivatives to keep doing business with the hyperscalers.

title: S. Korea to Deploy Locally Built Nuclear Submarine by Late-2030s
title_cn: 韩国将在 2030 年代末部署本土建造的核潜艇
summary: South Korea unveiled a roadmap to develop nuclear-powered submarines and deploy the first vessel by the late 2030s, as President Lee Jae Myung convened a new defense strategy council Tuesday focused on strengthening the nation’s military autonomy.

title: North Korea Fires Ballistic Missiles in Latest Weapons Test
title_cn: 朝鲜在最新的武器测试中发射弹道导弹
summary: North Korea fired multiple projectiles including short-range ballistic missiles on Tuesday, South Korea’s military said, the latest in a series of weapons tests by Pyongyang so far this year.

title: US Strikes Iran as Trump Says Talks 'Proceeding Nicely' | Daybreak Europe 05/26/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称会谈“进展顺利”，美国打击伊朗欧洲黎明 05/26/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

US and Israeli jets struck Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and other targets, hours after President Donald Trump had suggested negotiations with Tehran over an interim deal were progressing.

The attack took place south of Larak Island in the Strait of Hormuz, with several Iranian personnel killed, Iran’s state-run Nour News reported, without providing further details. Trump earlier said negotiations between the US and Iran over an agreement to extend their ceasefire and reopen the strait were “proceeding nicely.”

Today's guest: Shriya Samarth, StoneX, EMEA Head of Rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Defense Minister Expected to Skip Singapore Forum Again
title_cn: 中国国防部长预计将再次缺席新加坡论坛
summary: China’s top military official is expected to skip Asia’s biggest defense forum for a second year in a row, according to people familiar with the matter, ceding to the US and its allies an opportunity for public defense diplomacy.

title: Ex-Central Banker Named as Senegal’s Premier Ahead of IMF Talks
title_cn: 在国际货币基金组织会谈之前，前央行行长被任命为塞内加尔总理
summary: Senegalese President Bassirou Diomaye Faye named a veteran economist and former central banker as his new prime minister, shoring up his economic team ahead of the restart of talks with the International Monetary Fund on a new funding program.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets as Trump Hails Progress on Talks
title_cn: 特朗普称赞会谈取得进展，美国袭击伊朗目标
summary: US and Israeli jets struck Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and other targets, hours after President Donald Trump had suggested negotiations with Tehran over an interim deal were progressing. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Tells US to Evacuate Citizens, Diplomats From Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯要求美国从基辅撤离公民和外交官
summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov advised US State Secretary Marco Rubio to evacuate US citizens and diplomats from Kyiv, as the Kremlin plans to continue heavy strikes on the Ukrainian capital, according to a statement published by the Russian Foreign Ministry Monday. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Quad Launches Indo-Pacific Monitor Plan as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹危机加深，四方启动印太监测计划
summary: The US, Japan, India and Australia on Tuesday launched a maritime surveillance initiative for the Indo-Pacific region, among other measures, as the countries’ foreign ministers gathered in New Delhi for a high-profile summit aimed at countering growing threats to commerce.

title: Spanish Probe Into Former Leader Is Hurting Sánchez’s Government
title_cn: 西班牙对前领导人的调查正在伤害桑切斯政府
summary: When Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez overturned a significant polling deficit to hold on to power in 2023, his Socialist predecessor José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero was a crucial ally on the campaign trail. Three years later, Zapatero’s legal troubles are threatening the Socialist leader’s bid for reelection next year.

title: Iran War Boosts $10 Billion Kazakh Rail Plan Linking EU to China
title_cn: 伊朗战争推动哈萨克斯坦100亿美元铁路计划连接欧盟与中国
summary: Kazakhstan’s national railroad operator is expanding its track and infrastructure to meet growing demand for transporting goods between China and Europe as trade flows shift in response to the Iran war.

title: US Strikes Targets in Iran as Trump Hails Progress on Peace Deal
title_cn: 特朗普赞扬和平协议取得进展，美国袭击伊朗目标
summary: US and Israeli jets struck Iranian vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and other targets, hours after President Donald Trump had suggested negotiations with Tehran over an interim deal were progressing.

title: Singapore’s Top Envoy Heads to North Korea in Rare Visit
title_cn: 新加坡高级特使罕见访问朝鲜
summary: Singapore’s top diplomat is making a rare visit to North Korea as part of a regional tour that includes stops in China and South Korea as the city-state seeks to boost diplomatic engagement amid intensifying geopolitical tensions.

title: Russia Tells US to Evacuate Its Diplomats and Citizens From Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯要求美国从基辅撤离其外交官和公民
summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov called US State Secretary Marco Rubio to advise him to evacuate US citizens and diplomats from Kyiv, as the Kremlin plans to continue heavy strikes on the Ukrainian capital, according to a statement published by the Russian Foreign Ministry Monday.

title: Iran Signals Potential Easing of Internet Blackout Amid US Talks
title_cn: 伊朗暗示在美国会谈期间可能放松互联网封锁
summary: Iran’s government could soon roll back some restrictions on a months-long digital blackout that has cut off millions of its citizens from the internet, the official Islamic Republic News Agency said, as diplomatic talks between the US and Tehran gather pace.

title: Israel to Intensify Lebanon Strikes Amid US-Iran Deal Talks
title_cn: 以色列将在美伊协议谈判期间加强对黎巴嫩的打击
summary: Israel will intensify its strikes against Hezbollah, Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Monday, amid stepped-up negotiations between the US and Iran to bring an end to the conflict in the region.

title: Mr. Bing Chili Crisp Aims to Reach Restaurants, Retail
title_cn: Mr. Bing Chili Crisp 旨在进军餐厅、零售业
summary: Brian Goldberg, founder and chief growth officer of Mr.  Bing foods, said that his brand of chili crisp and new line of Asian barbecue sauces has found success by selling products to both traditional retail and restaurant customers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Tells Regulator to Probe Private Equity Role in Childcare
title_cn: 英国要求监管机构调查私募股权在儿童保育中的作用
summary: Education Secretary Bridget Phillipson urged the UK’s competition regulator to probe the role played by private equity firms in the £9.5 billion ($12.8 billion) government-funded childcare market, as Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s government seeks to bear down on living costs.

title: Meloni’s Coalition Claims Venice Win After Referendum Blow
title_cn: 梅洛尼的联盟声称威尼斯在公投失败后获胜
summary: The candidate backed by Italy’s governing coalition was elected mayor of Venice, in an unexpected win for Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni.

title: Mexico to Host Iran Players for World Cup as War Tensions Simmer
title_cn: 战争紧张局势一触即发，墨西哥将接待伊朗球员参加世界杯
summary: Mexico will serve as the Iranian national team’s World Cup base after US authorities refused to let the players stay overnight on its soil amid ongoing military tensions.

title: Putin Signs Law on Use of Army to Aid Russians Detained Abroad
title_cn: 普京签署关于使用军队援助被拘留在国外的俄罗斯人的法律
summary: President Vladimir Putin signed a law allowing him to deploy the military to foreign countries to aid Russian citizens who’ve been detained or face prosecution.

title: Carney Warns of ‘Dangerous Bluff’ in Alberta Vote, Citing Brexit
title_cn: 卡尼以英国脱欧为由警告阿尔伯塔省投票存在“危险的虚张声势”
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney said Alberta’s voters should be wary of separatists promoting a “dangerous bluff,” citing his own experience in leading the Bank of England during the Brexit referendum.

title: Mexico Exports Rise to Their Highest Level on Record in April
title_cn: 墨西哥四月份出口升至有记录以来的最高水平
summary: Mexico’s trade surplus widened far more than expected in April to $4.52 billion, well above the median estimate of $476.35 million in a Bloomberg survey, as exports climbed to the highest since the data began in 1980. The surge highlights how the country continues to strengthen its role as a manufacturing hub for the US economy as Washington takes a tougher stance on trade. The cumulative trade surplus for the first four months of the year reached $3.51 billion, reversing from a $314 million def

title: Trump Pushes Saudis to Recognize Israel as Part of Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普敦促沙特承认以色列是伊朗协议的一部分
summary: US President Donald Trump stepped up pressure on Saudi Arabia and Qatar to recognize Israel by joining the Abraham Accords, saying it would complement an interim peace deal he’s negotiating with Iran.

title: Trump Says Iran Talks ‘Proceeding Nicely’ as Deal Appears Closer
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗谈判“进展顺利”，协议似乎更接近
summary: US President Donald Trump said negotiations with Iran over an interim deal to extend their ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz were “proceeding nicely.”

title: Trump Pushes to Quiet GOP Critics of Iranian Dealmaking
title_cn: 特朗普敦促共和党对伊朗交易的批评保持沉默
summary: The president urges supporters to not “listen to the losers”

title: Kenya Treasury Warns Budget Strain May Force Spending Cuts
title_cn: 肯尼亚财政部警告预算紧张可能迫使削减支出
summary: Kenya may be forced to cut spending in its next fiscal budget as rising debt-service costs, limited tax options and tighter borrowing constraints strain the Treasury’s financing plans.

title: Xi Thanks Pakistan’s Sharif for Mediating in Iran Conflict
title_cn: 习近平感谢巴基斯坦谢里夫调解伊朗冲突
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping thanked visiting Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif for Pakistan’s work in mediating talks between the US and Iran — underscoring Beijing’s push to end a war that poses a range of risks to the world’s second-biggest economy.

title: Japan Won’t Add Bonds on Calendar Basis to Fund Extra Budget
title_cn: 日本不会按日历增加债券来为额外预算提供资金
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said the government will finance its extra budget without increasing bond issuance on a calendar basis, in a likely attempt to ease market concerns over government finances.
